job_title: Senior Data Engineer (Azure, dbt, Microsoft Fabric)
description:
About Huenx AS
Huenx AS is an AI-first consultancy and product company based in Norway. We deliver software and AI consulting services to clients across Norway and Europe, and we build our own AI-driven products. Our model brings together Norwegian business insight and senior Vietnamese engineering talent — small, highly skilled teams that work effectively with AI to deliver faster than larger organizations.
We run data-intensive projects across multiple industries — property and compliance platforms, industrial AI in oil and gas, and workflow automation. We are hiring for both full-time and hourly engagements.

The role
This is a hands-on senior data engineering role. You build and own the data pipelines and models that power reporting and AI across our client projects — on Azure and Microsoft Fabric, end-to-end. You use AI tools as a core part of how you work, not an afterthought. You work directly with our team and our international clients, so clear English communication is essential.Responsibilities
Build and maintain scalable ETL/ELT pipelines and transformation workflows on Microsoft Fabric and Azure.Implement a clean medallion architecture (bronze / silver / gold) for layered, reliable data.Build and manage transformation models with dbt.Build well-structured data models that serve both Power BI reporting and AI/ML consumption.Integrate data from diverse internal and external sources across multiple domains.Use AI tools (for coding and for daily work) as your default workflow to move fast without sacrificing quality.Document pipelines, transformation logic, and data models clearly.
requirements: 5–10 years of data engineering experience, with hands-on ownership in production environments.Strong hands-on experience with Azure and Microsoft Fabric. Required.Strong experience with dbt and medallion architecture. Required.Strong SQL and solid data modeling skills (star schema, ETL/ELT design patterns). Python is a plus.Familiarity with Power BI and how the data layer drives reporting performance.Experience with data pipelines that feed AI and ML models is a strong advantage.AI-first: proficient with AI tools for coding and daily work, and able to use them to deliver real, production-grade work. This is a core requirement, not a bonus.English: professional working proficiency. You must be able to communicate comfortably and clearly with international clients in English, both written and spoken.Able to work Norwegian business hours, which is 12:00 – 21:00 Vietnam time (ICT), Monday to Friday.
benefits: AI-first working environment — you'll work with modern AI tooling every day, on both client projects and our own products.Remote and flexible, working Norwegian business hours (12:00 – 21:00 Vietnam time) — your mornings are free.Salary range: 1,500–3,000 USD (full-time equivalent), depending on experience and engagement type.For full-time roles: 13th-month salary, social insurance, company trips, learning and training, and other benefits according to company policies.Work on real, complex data problems — not simple pipelines.Opportunity to travel to Norway for onsite collaboration, or potentially relocate, depending on performance and project needs.

job_title: Remote Data Engineer - AI Data Platform Japan (Python)
location: Ha Noi - Da Nang - Ho Chi Minh
description:
What Makes SalesNow Different
Data scale: 8B data points, 14M records, 2.3M daily updates (vs. 1M-100M rows at typical companies)Data ownership: You build and own Japan's largest corporate intelligence platform (vs. processing someone else's data)AI integration: 20+ AI pipelines in production, MCP Server live (vs. "We're planning to use AI someday")Dev tools: Claude Code MAX ($200/month), Cursor, CodeRabbit — all company-paid (vs. standard IDE, maybe Copilot)Your code's impact: Feeds AI products used by enterprise clients, millisecond latency matters (vs. dashboards no one reads)Career trajectory: Build Japan's data infrastructure → architect AI data products → global leverage (vs. same stack forever)Remote work: 100% remote, no relocation required (vs. hybrid / office-required)
Why This Role Exists
AI models are commodities now. The cost of running GPT-3.5-equivalent models dropped 280x in two years. Every company has access to the same foundation models. The war moved to data — who owns it, who structures it, who feeds it to AI.
Oracle's Larry Ellison said it plainly on his December 2025 earnings call: "AI models are trained on the same public data, so they're rapidly commoditizing. AI inference on private data will be an even bigger, more valuable business." McKinsey echoes: "By 2030, the AI leaders will be defined not by who trained the biggest model, but by who built the most reliable systems on proprietary data."
SalesNow owns 14 million company records and 8 billion data points — the largest structured corporate intelligence platform in Japan. This data updates 2.3 million records daily, with differential refresh as fast as every 60 seconds. Hiring signals, funding rounds, organizational changes, press releases, job postings — all structured, all real-time, all proprietary.
This data doesn't exist inside any LLM's training set. The only way to access it is through SalesNow. That's the moat.
We need data engineers who can build and scale the pipelines that make this moat wider every day.
What You'll Build
This is not "maintain existing ETL jobs." You're building the data nervous system of Japan's corporate intelligence.
The Scale
14 million+ company records across Japan's entire business landscape — from Toyota to a 3-person startup in Okinawa8 billion data points structured and queryable at millisecond speed2.3 million records updated daily — hiring signals, funding rounds, organizational changes, press releases, job postingsSub-minute differential refresh — when a company posts a new job or announces funding, SalesNow knows within 60 seconds42+ data sources feeding into a unified schema5 delivery formats: Web app UI / CRM integration (Salesforce, HubSpot) / MCP Server / Data API / Custom AI Agents
AI-Native Development Culture
SalesNow doesn't just "use AI." AI is the operating system of how we build software. What this means for you, concretely:
Claude Code MAX — Company-paid for every engineer. This is a $200/month tool that most individual developers can't justify. You get it Day 1, fully coveredMonthly AI tool budget — Tens of thousands of yen per person, on top of Claude Code MAX, for any AI tool you want to tryCodeRabbit — Automated PR reviews powered by AI. Every pull request gets AI review before human reviewVibe coding culture — Not just engineers. The CEO, COO, and business teams all write code with AI assistance. When you propose a technical solution, leadership actually understands it20+ AI pipelines in production — X post generation, candidate screening, PR monitoring, behavioral analytics, financial page generation — all running daily in production. This isn't a demo. It's how the company operatesNo "AI committee" or "innovation lab" gatekeeping — You want to try a new approach? Ship it. The decision loop is measured in hours, not quarters
Why this matters for your career: In 3 years, every engineering role will require AI-native development skills. At SalesNow, you build those skills now — not by watching tutorials, but by shipping production AI systems daily.
Before You Apply — Quick Self-CheckPlease confirm the following before submitting your application:
I have professional experience building data pipelines or data processing systems with PythonI have professional experience writing SQL queries and working with databasesI am available for full-time remote work (40 hours/week)
Bonus: Japanese language ability (JLPT N3+) is a strong plus.In Your Cover Letter, Please Include:1. The largest dataset or data pipeline you've worked with — how many records per day, and what did it do?2. What was the most technically challenging problem you solved in your career? (1-2 sentences is fine)3. Which data tools or frameworks have you used? (e.g., Airflow, dbt, Spark, Kafka, Elasticsearch — list any that apply)

2+ years of professional data engineering experienceStrong Python skills — clean, testable pipeline codeStrong SQL skills — complex queries, window functions, query optimizationExperience with at least one orchestration tool — Airflow, Dagster, Prefect, or equivalentExperience with relational databases at scale — PostgreSQL preferredEnglish proficiency (professional working level)
Nice to Have
Experience with Elasticsearch or OpenSearch at scaledbt experienceWeb scraping / large-scale data collection systemsExperience with data quality frameworks and monitoringAWS experience (S3, Lambda, ECS, RDS, etc.)RAG pipeline / vector database experienceExperience processing 1M+ records dailyJapanese language ability (JLPT N3 or above)

Xây dựng hạ tầng dữ liệu, thiết kế và tối ưu data pipeline.Phát triển và duy trì các data warehouse, data lake để lưu trữ và xử lý dữ liệu.Sử dụng các công cụ và nền tảng dữ liệu để thu thập, tổ chức và làm sạch dữ liệu.Xây dựng các mô hình dữ liệu, định dạng dữ liệu để phục vụ phân tích và báo cáo.Hợp tác với các đội nhóm khác để hiểu nhu cầu dữ liệu và phát triển giải pháp phù hợp.Đảm bảo chất lượng dữ liệu, bảo mật dữ liệu và tối ưu hiệu suất hệ thống.Nghiên cứu, cập nhật các công nghệ mới nhằm nâng cao hiệu quả xử lý dữ liệu.Ứng dụng các công cụ AI trong việc thu thập, xử lý, làm sạch, phân tích dữ liệu và tự động hóa báo cáo nhằm nâng cao hiệu quả vận hành, tối ưu chất lượng dữ liệu và hỗ trợ ra quyết định

Những điều bạn cần có để đáp ứng vị trí này
Tốt nghiệp Đại học chuyên ngành Khoa học Máy tính, Công nghệ Thông tin, Khoa học Dữ liệu hoặc các ngành liên quan.Có kinh nghiệm lập trình (Python, SQL hoặc các ngôn ngữ liên quan).Hiểu biết về data pipeline, kiến trúc dữ liệu và cách thức hoạt động của dữ liệu trong doanh nghiệp.Kinh nghiệm làm việc với các nền tảng cloud (AWS, GCP, Azure) là một lợi thế.Kỹ năng giao tiếp, trình bày tốt, có khả năng làm việc với nhiều bộ phận.Tiếng Anh tốt là một lợi thế.
Những điều cần có để phù hợp với văn hóa Global Glory
Chúng mình trách nhiệm và hết mình với mục tiêu cá nhân cũng như mục tiêu công ty. Chúng mình không ngừng học hỏi để nâng cao giá trị bản thân cũng như giá trị doanh nghiệp. Chúng mình hiểu và chia sẻ những giá trị cốt lõi của Global Glory, đặc biệt là các mục tiêu liên quan đến phát triển bền vững, trách nhiệm xã hội và phát triển cộng đồng.

description:
Techcom Life – A Proud Member of Techcombank Ecosystem
As part of Techcombank’s integrated financial ecosystem, Techcom Life is built on a strong foundation of Health and Wealth, with a mission to empower individuals to live life to the fullest. We accompany each customer on their journey to achieve their aspirations, delivering holistic financial and well-being solutions that create lasting value.
Guided by the belief that true growth comes from the harmony of strength, security, and balance, Techcom Life brings together innovation, expertise, and care to help life grow bigger every day.
JOB PURPOSE
-The job holder is responsible for designing and developing programs, algorithms and automated processes to cleanse, integrate and evaluate large datasets from disparate sources and implement complex business logic as needed with the available data processing tools.- The job holder will be responsible for integrating new data sources to increase throughput of existing systems, managing data pipelines that facilitate robust analysis, and sourcing và preparing data to ensure data completeness on metadata platforms.
Key Accountabilities
Data Architecture
–  Deliver functionality required for business and data analysts, data scientists and other business roles to advance the overall analytic performance and strategy of the bank- Build the best practices and strategies for data infrastructure to fulfill data analytic and utilization needs of the business with emerging latest technologies and capabilities.- Proactively drive the effort of identifying opportunities to manage data and provide solutions for complex data feeds within the bank.- Evaluate various data architectures in the bank and utilize them to develop data solutions to meet business requirements.- Drive the delivery of data products and services into systems and business processes in compliance with internal regulatory requirements.- Oversee the review of internal and external business and product requirements for data operations and activity and suggests changes and upgrades to systems and storage to accommodate ongoing needs.
Data Integration
- Strategically obtain and integrate data and information from various sources into the firm’s platforms, solutions and statistical models.- Lead discussion with Data Scientists to understand the data requirements and create re-usable data assets to enable data scientists to build and deploy machine learning models faster.- Design, build, and maintain optimized data pipelines and ETL solutions as business support tools in providing analysis and real time analytics platform for critical decision making.- Ensure data assets are organized and stored in an efficient way so that information is high quality, reliable, flexible, and efficient.
Project Management- Manage project conflicts, challenges and dynamic business requirements to keep operations running at high performance.- Work with team leads to resolve people problems and project roadblocks, conduct post mortem and root cause analysis to help squads continuously improve their practices to ensure maximum productivity.Talent Development- Mentor and coach junior fellows into fully competent Data Engineers.- Identify and encourage areas for growth and improvement within the team.
requirements: - 7+ years of relevant experience with developing, debugging, scripting and employing big data technologies (e.g. Hadoop, Spark, Flink, Kafka, Arrow, Tableau), database technologies (e.g. SQL, NoSQL, Graph databases), and programming languages (e.g. Python, R, Scala, Java, Rust, Kotlin) with preference towards functional/trait oriented- English proficiency requirements are pursuant to Techcombank's policy- Deep experience in designing and building dimensional data models, ETL processes, applied data warehouse concepts and methodologies, optimized data pipelines and wore the architect hat in the past or worked with one extensivelyDeep experience with monitoring complex system and solving data and systems issues having a consistent and algorithmic approach to resolving them- Deep understanding of Information Security principles to ensure compliant handling and management of all data- Experience working in Agile teams to lead successful digital transformation projects, having mastered Agile principles, practices and Scrum methodologies- Has the know-how and the scripting and coding prowess to set up, configure và maintain a machine learning model development environment- Experience architecting, coding and delivering high performance micro services and/or recommenders delivering recommendations to (tens of) millions of users

description:
About the Role
You will own the pipelines that move every event, transaction, and Change Data Capture (CDC) record from our products into a ClickHouse lakehouse and back out to the tools that act on it. Concretely, you own the medallion architecture (Bronze → Silver → Gold) that turns raw events and revenue postbacks into the curated, aggregated tables that power Business Intelligence (BI), marketing attribution, and our emerging Machine Learning / Artificial Intelligence (ML/AI) workloads.
This is a hands-on, end-to-end data engineering role on a modern open-source stack — not a narrow ticket-taking position. You will touch ingestion, storage, transformation, orchestration, and activation, and you will be the person who decides how a given dataset should be modeled and served.
What You'll Work On
Ingestion & event collection
Maintain and extend event collection through RudderStack (our Customer Data Platform), PostHog, GA4, and server-side event sources across the web app and mobile appsLand raw revenue events from Stripe and Apple In-App Purchase (IAP) postbacks reliably and idempotently — billing data has zero tolerance for loss or duplication.
Integration & storage
Run Airbyte connectors, including Change Data Capture from internal production databases, into the AWS S3 data lake.Manage the S3 → ClickHouse load path and keep the lake organized, partitioned, and costefficient.
Transformation — the medallion core
Build and operate the Bronze → Silver → Gold pipelines in ClickHouse.Make correct use of ClickHouse engine families: ReplacingMergeTree for deduplicated, CDC-driven Silver tables and AggregatingMergeTree for the Gold aggregates that BI and ML consume.Model subscription-domain data — trials, conversions, Monthly Recurring Revenue (MRR), churn, Lifetime Value (LTV) — so that one number means one thing everywhere.
Orchestration & reliability
Author, schedule, and monitor pipelines in Apache Airflow.Build data-quality checks, freshness Service Level Agreements (SLAs), alerting, and lineage so failures are caught before stakeholders see them.
Activation & reverse pipelines
Sync curated data out to BigQuery and to the activation layer: ad platforms for conversion tracking (Google Ads, Meta Ads, Apple Ads, and the TikTok/Reddit Ads channels as they come online), plus Braze, Singular, and Firebase.Feed the Gold layer to AWS QuickSight dashboards and prepare clean, well-documented feature tables for ML/AI use cases.
requirements:
Required
7+ years building production data pipelines, with strong, idiomatic SQL and Python.Hands-on experience with a columnar analytical warehouse — ClickHouse strongly preferred.Solid grasp of dimensional / medallion data modeling and when to denormalize, dedup, or preaggregate.Experience orchestrating pipelines with Apache Airflow.Experience with an Extract-Load-Transform (ELT) / ingestion tool — Airbyte preferred — and a working understanding of Change Data Capture.Comfort on AWS, especially S3 as a data lake.Track record of treating data quality, observability, and idempotency as first-class — not afterthoughts.
benefits: Full gross salary from Day 1 of Probation (2 months)Annual performance-based bonus (discretionary)Compulsory Social, Health & Unemployment Insurance from Day 1 of ProbationSupplemental health insurance — Allianz / Bảo ViệtMacBook provided for work12 days paid annual leave/year, +1 day per 5 consecutive yearsPublic holidays per Vietnamese lawTraining & professional development provided as neededFree parking

company_name: SHS | Chứng khoán Sài Gòn - Hà Nội
description:
1. Mô tả công việc
Xây dựng và vận hành hệ thống Data Warehouse (DWH)
Thiết kế, phát triển và vận hành hệ thống DWH phục vụ lưu trữ và quản trị dữ liệu tập trung. Thiết kế mô hình dữ liệu và Data Mart phục vụ khai thác dữ liệu cho các hệ thống downstream. Xây dựng kiến trúc dữ liệu đảm bảo khả năng mở rộng, ổn định và hiệu năng cao.
Phát triển pipeline dữ liệu
Xây dựng và vận hành các pipeline ETL/ELT lấy dữ liệu từ nhiều nguồn: RDBMS (Oracle, PostgreSQL, MSSQL, MySQL…) MongoDB API File batch Streaming source Thiết kế cơ chế đồng bộ dữ liệu batch, incremental hoặc near realtime. Xây dựng cơ chế CDC và đồng bộ dữ liệu giữa hệ thống nguồn và DWH. Tự động hóa quy trình xử lý và đồng bộ dữ liệu.
Làm sạch và chuẩn hóa dữ liệu
Thực hiện cleansing, transform và chuẩn hóa dữ liệu từ nhiều nguồn khác nhau. Mapping dữ liệu giữa hệ thống transactional và DWH. Xử lý dữ liệu lỗi, trùng lặp, thiếu dữ liệu hoặc không đồng nhất. Xây dựng các rule kiểm tra chất lượng dữ liệu (Data Quality).
Tổng hợp dữ liệu
Xây dựng các bảng aggregate/fact phục vụ khai thác dữ liệu. Thiết kế và tối ưu logic xử lý dữ liệu khối lượng lớn. Tối ưu hiệu năng query, partitioning và indexing.
Vận hành & tối ưu hệ thống
Monitoring và xử lý lỗi pipeline/ETL job. Phân tích và xử lý sự cố liên quan đến dữ liệu. Thực hiện reconciliation giữa dữ liệu nguồn và DWH. Đảm bảo SLA và tính ổn định của hệ thống dữ liệu.
2. Phạm vi công việc
Bộ phận Data Engineering phụ trách:
Kết nối và lấy dữ liệu từ các hệ thống nguồn Làm sạch, chuẩn hóa và tổng hợp dữ liệu Lưu trữ dữ liệu vào DWH/Data Mart
Phần báo cáo, dashboard và BI do bộ phận khác phụ trách.
requirements:
3. Yêu cầu
Kiến thức & kinh nghiệm
Tốt nghiệp Đại học chuyên ngành CNTT hoặc tương đương. Có kinh nghiệm làm việc với hệ thống DWH, ETL/ELT hoặc Data Pipeline. Hiểu về kiến trúc: Data Warehouse Data Mart ETL/ELT CDC Có kinh nghiệm xử lý dữ liệu lớn là lợi thế.
Kỹ năng kỹ thuật
Thành thạo SQL và tối ưu truy vấn. Có kinh nghiệm với: Oracle PostgreSQL MSSQL MySQL MongoDB Hiểu đặc điểm dữ liệu relational và document-based database. Có kinh nghiệm với các công cụ ETL/workflow: Airflow Talend Pentaho NiFi dbt Có khả năng lập trình: Python Java Hiểu về Kafka hoặc streaming data là lợi thế.
Ưu tiên
Có kinh nghiệm vận hành hệ thống dữ liệu lớn hoặc realtime. Có kiến thức về Linux, Docker, Kubernetes là lợi thế. Có kinh nghiệm tối ưu hiệu năng hệ thống dữ liệu.
4. Kỹ năng mềm
Tư duy logic và phân tích dữ liệu tốt. Chủ động và có trách nhiệm trong công việc. Có khả năng làm việc nhóm và phối hợp liên phòng ban. Kỹ năng xử lý vấn đề và troubleshooting tốt.
5. Công nghệ sử dụng
Oracle / PostgreSQL / MSSQL / MongoDB Airflow / Kafka Python / Java Linux Docker / Kubernetes GitLab CI/CD
6. KPI chính
Độ ổn định của pipeline dữ liệu SLA đồng bộ dữ liệu Chất lượng và độ chính xác dữ liệu Hiệu năng xử lý ETL Số lượng incident liên quan dữ liệu Tỷ lệ tự động hóa pipeline dữ liệu

description:

Thực hiện công việc tích hợp, phát triển dữ liệu, hỗ trợ vận hành hệ thống công nghệ dữ liệu trong mảng chức năng được giao đảm bảo đúng quy trình, quy định của MB nhằm thực hiện thành công mục tiêu chung của đơn vị.Tự phát triển hoặc phối hợp cùng các nhà cung cấp phát triển/triển khai các giải pháp Công nghệ dữ liệu theo các công việc được phân công.Duy trì hoạt động của các sản phẩm/dịch vụ được phân công.Nghiên cứu, tìm kiếm, tham mưu các giải pháp/sáng kiến Công nghệ dữ liệu và đề xuất nhà cung cấp đáp ứng yêu cầu của công việc.Phát triển, kiểm thử (Unit test), nghiệm thu và hỗ trợ mức 2 (Level 2) các sản phẩm và dịch vụ Công nghệ dữ liệu

description:
Role Summary
Itviec’s client is seeking a Lead Platform Engineer who will take ownership of the design, implementation, and operation of our core data, analytics, and ML infrastructure. This role spans across platform architecture, DevSecOps, DataOps, and ML infrastructure, and requires a combination of strategic thought leadership and hands-on execution. You will build, integrate, and operate platforms on AWS and Databricks, enabling scalable, secure, production-grade ML/AI solutions.

Key Responsibilities
Architect and implement end-to-end data and ML platforms: data lakes, warehouses, streaming and batch pipelines, model training/deployment infrastructure, on AWS + Databricks. Lead DevSecOps and DataOps practices: infrastructure as code (IaC), CI/CD pipelines for data & ML workflows, secure multi-account/multi-region cloud operations. Integrate AWS services (e.g., S3, Redshift, Kinesis, Lambda, EKS/ECS) with Databricks runtime, Delta Lake, Unity Catalog etc to build scalable, performant pipelines. Build and operate ML infrastructure: training clusters, model versioning, MLOps toolchain (e.g., MLflow), model monitoring and observability, automatic retraining workflows. Establish data governance, lineage, quality, observability standards across data pipelines and ML workflows. Mentor engineering teams, define architectural best practices and guide implementation of high-scale data/ML systems. Optimize system performance, cost and scalability; diagnose and resolve large-scale production issues. Continuously evaluate new tools and technologies in the areas of cloud, data platform, DevSecOps, ML infrastructure and apply them to drive innovation.
requirements: 7+ years of experience in data platform architecture, cloud/ML infrastructure engineering or related roles. Deep technical expertise in Databricks and AWS: demonstrated ability to design, integrate and operate solutions spanning both platforms. Strong hands-on implementation skills: you will not just design but build, deploy and operate the platform. Proven track record of building and operating scalable ML/AI platforms in production (model training & deployment). Expertise in Apache Spark, Delta Lake, modern data pipeline frameworks (batch + streaming). Strong background in infrastructure as code (Terraform, CloudFormation), CI/CD for data/ML, and DevSecOps practices. Proficiency in Python and SQL; familiarity with Scala or equivalent is a plus. Experience with data governance, data lineage, observability and MLOps frameworks (e.g., MLflow, Airflow, dbt). Bonus: Experience in fintech, regulated industries or high-security environments.
benefits:

Our client is a fast-scaling Fintech platform enabling seamless banking solutions across emerging markets. They blend innovation with scalable tech infrastructure to help millions access secure, intuitive financial services. Operating in a highly dynamic international environment, the company offers a sustainable professional space with a clear focus on technological excellence, agile culture, and continuous human development.
Why You’ll Love Working Here
Financial Package: 13th-month salary pro-rata, attractive performance bonuses of up to 2 months, 100% salary during probation, and fully covered meal and parking allowances.Work-Life Balance: Strictly 40-hour workweek (Monday to Friday) in a Hybrid setup, plus a generous leave package of 20 days Health Care: Premium health care package provided for both you and your family right from the start (no seniority required)Career Growth: Clear career acceleration through SMART goals, supported by technical seminars, conferences, career talks, and exclusive overseas travel opportunities for training and work.Engagement: A vibrant, values-driven international culture featuring internal Hackathons, dynamic company events (team building, coffee runs, blue card), and a highly agile working environment.

description:
JOB PURPOSE:
The Data Engineer is responsible for designing, building, operating, and optimizing the Lakehouse data platform on Microsoft Azure, with a strong focus on Azure Databricks, Unity Catalog, Delta Lake, and related integration services. This role ensures data is ingested, transformed, governed, and served in a stable, secure, scalable, and AI/GenAI-ready manner to support reporting, advanced analytics, self-service data use, and machine learning use cases both now and in the future.The position works closely with business teams, analysts, data visualization specialists, Data Champions, IT, and regional stakeholders to deliver production-grade data pipelines with strong emphasis on data quality, observability, performance, cost efficiency, and operational excellence across the platform.In addition, the Data Engineer proactively leverages AI tools (including Azure OpenAI and GenAI assistants) to improve coding productivity, documentation, troubleshooting, and automation, while designing the data platform with an AI-ready architecture capable of supporting feature engineering, model training, and real-time inference in the future.
JOB DESCRIPTON:
1. Lakehouse Platform Development & Maintenance
Design and build Lakehouse architecture on Azure Databricks using Unity Catalog, Delta Lake, and Medallion Architecture; develop production-grade pipelines using Azure Data Factory, Databricks Workflows, Auto Loader, and modern integration methods.Apply incremental loading, CDC, merge operations, schema evolution, Liquid Clustering, monitoring, alerting, logging, observability, and automated table maintenance (OPTIMIZE, VACUUM, Predictive Optimization).
2. Data Governance, Security & Compliance
Implement Unity Catalog as the centralized governance foundation; manage metadata, lineage, and access control across catalog/schema/table/view/volume; apply row filters and column masking for sensitive data.Maintain data quality standards, automated quality checks, audit logging, authorization matrix, data catalog documentation, and compliance with data protection requirements.
3. AI/ML Foundation & Feature Engineering
Prepare gold-layer tables for analytics and training data; support MLflow, Feature Store (if applicable), and design streaming pipelines for real-time/near-real-time use cases.Leverage Azure OpenAI and GenAI tools to improve coding productivity, documentation, troubleshooting, automation, and data profiling.
4. Cost & Performance Optimization
Optimize compute and storage costs through auto-scaling, spot instances, workload-aware sizing, job scheduling, SQL/PySpark tuning, and cost anomaly alerting.
5. Collaboration, Documentation & Continuous Improvement
Work with business stakeholders, analysts, visualization specialists, Data Champions, IT, and regional teams; document architecture, pipelines, runbooks, and knowledge base; apply Git, Databricks Repos, CI/CD, and continuous learning
requirements:
Qualifications
Bachelor's degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, Data Science, Information Systems, or a related field.High priority for candidates with Microsoft Azure Data Engineer Associate (DP-203), Azure Fundamentals (AZ-900), Databricks Data Engineer Associate/Professional, or equivalent certifications
Experience
Minimum 3-5 years of experience as a Data Engineer or in a similar enterprise data role, with hands-on experience in Azure Databricks, Azure Data Factory, Delta Lake, Unity Catalog, Medallion Architecture, operational support, optimization, streaming pipelines, and integration/CI-CD practices
Competencies
Proficiency in SQL/Spark SQL, Python & PySpark; master ETL/ELT, data modeling, Lakehouse/data warehouse concepts, Azure Databricks, Data Factory, Event Hubs, Synapse Link, ADLS Gen2, Blob, API integration, and structured/semi-structured/unstructured data.Deep understanding of data governance, quality frameworks, lineage, RBAC/ABAC, row-level security, column masks, compliance (GDPR, HIPAA), data observability, CI/CD & IaC.AI/ML and GenAI ready: data preparation for AI/ML, MLflow, Feature Store concepts, leveraging Azure OpenAI/GitHub Copilot/GenAI assistants for coding, documentation, profiling, and troubleshooting.There is system thinking, the ability to standardize ways of working, reusable patterns, clear documentation, version control, testing, dev/test/prod deployment, and continuous learning about Fabric, Synapse evolution, Databricks positioning.
Language(s)
Proficiency in English (reading, writing, technical communication).
benefits: 13th month salary, KPI bonus, annual salary reviewAnnual Health Check, Year End PartyCompany Trip, Team Building, Family DayHealth Insurance (Generali care 24/24 Insurance)Birthday Gift, Staff Gift

About the Company:
AIRR Labs, headquartered in Singapore, is a leading e-commerce enabler in Southeast Asia, specializing in FMCG, Beauty, and Lifestyle brands on platforms like TikTok Shop, Shopee, and Lazada. Established in 2019, AIRR Labs has over 350 experts across Thailand, the Philippines, Vietnam, Malaysia, and Singapore, with a technology hub in Vietnam. The company provides comprehensive digital commerce solutions, including content strategy, performance marketing, store management, short-form video production, livestreaming, and multi-channel fulfillment. As a certified TikTok Strategic Agency, Shopee Premium Enabler, and Lazada Star Enabler, AIRR Labs partners with global brands such as Unilever, Colgate-Palmolive, Estée Lauder, and Adidas.

description:
About AIRR Labs
AIRR Labs, headquartered in Singapore, is a leading e-commerce enabler in Southeast Asia, specializing in FMCG, Beauty, and Lifestyle brands across platforms such as TikTok Shop, Shopee, and Lazada. Since 2019, AIRR Labs has grown to more than 350 experts across Thailand, the Philippines, Vietnam, Malaysia, and Singapore, with a technology hub in Vietnam.
We partner with global brands including Unilever, Colgate-Palmolive, Estée Lauder, and Adidas to deliver end-to-end digital commerce solutions spanning content strategy, performance marketing, livestreaming, store operations, and fulfillment.

About the Role
We are looking for a strong Senior Data Engineer to help build and shape the foundation of AIRR Labs’ data platform.
This role is ideal for someone who enjoys building systems from 0 to 1, solving ambiguous engineering problems, and designing scalable data architecture — not just maintaining existing pipelines.
As one of the first dedicated hires in this space, you will work closely with software engineers and product teams to define data standards, optimize platform reliability, and build a scalable data foundation that supports analytics and future AI-driven initiatives.
Scope:
40% Data Architecture — Partner with product and software engineering teams to design scalable data models, define architecture standards, and ensure clean data flows from source to consumption. 50% Data Engineering — Build and optimize ETL/ELT pipelines, write performant SQL and transformation logic, and maintain data quality across TB-scale datasets. 10% Infrastructure Reliability — Monitor platform uptime, troubleshoot incidents, and keep our cloud data infrastructure healthy.

What You’ll Do
Design and build scalable ETL/ELT pipelines and orchestration workflows.Develop and optimize data warehouse architecture, data models, and SQL performance across large-scale datasets.Build reliable batch-processing systems and improve platform observability, monitoring, and fault tolerance.Define data standards, naming conventions, and best practices for the data platform.Collaborate with software engineers and stakeholders to solve complex data and system design challenges.Contribute to future AI and automation initiatives such as intelligent inventory management and self-healing data pipelines.
requirements: 3+ years of experience in Data Engineering, Data Platform Engineering, or related fields.Strong experience building scalable data systems and pipelines from scratch.Strong SQL skills and understanding of data modeling, partitioning, and performance optimization.Hands-on experience with AWS services such as S3 and Lambda.Experience with analytical databases such as SingleStore, Snowflake, BigQuery, ClickHouse, Redshift, or similar.Experience with orchestration tools such as Airflow, dbt, or similar technologies.Proficiency in Python or another scripting/programming language.Strong problem-solving skills with the ability to think in systems and engineering trade-offs.High ownership, independent working style, and curiosity toward emerging technologies and AI-enabled workflows.

description:
About GoTymeX:
GoTymeX is Tyme Group's Technology & Product Development Hub with a global mission to become serial bank builders.
Our Financial Crime platform plays a critical role in protecting customers and the bank from fraud, money laundering, and other financial crimes using advanced data, analytics, AI, and automation.
About the Role
We’re looking for a Senior Data Engineer to join our Financial Crime team. You’ll be part of the group responsible for building and maintaining high-performance data pipelines that drive fraud detection, entity resolution, and compliance analytics across Tyme’s ecosystem. The ideal candidate should relocate to Vietnam.
You’ll work with large, complex datasets in Databricks, integrate data from multiple systems in real time and batch, and help design the data foundation for real-time risk detection and case management.
Key Responsibilities:
Build and optimize data ingestion pipelines using Python and PySpark to collect and transform data from multiple sources (transactions, KYC, AML, authentication, devices, logs, etc.). Proficiency in SQL (PostGres preferred) Design and maintain data model that support Financial Crime/Fraud detection, profiling, and entity resolution. Implement data quality checks and ensure data reliability across environments. Collaborate closely with Data Scientists, Analysts, Compliance, Operations and our Product/Feature teams to operationalize models and rules. Utilize jobs, workflows, APIs and streaming to  manage large-scale data processing workloads. Integrate with external systems (e.g. sanctions, ID&V, biometrics and authentication systems) to enrich risk and identity data. Support automation and monitoring of ETL processes to improve operational efficiency.

description:
- Lead the conceptual, logical, and physical data modeling efforts for the Data Lakehouse, Data Warehouse, and operational data stores, ensuring high quality and optimal performance.
- Define the overall data architecture roadmap and technology stack (Cloud, tools, services) to support high-volume data ingestion, transformation, and consumption across the enterprise.
- Design and document scalable, resilient, and cost-optimized ETL/ELT data integration patterns for diverse data sources (tourism platforms, social media, internal systems).
- Establish and enforce data governance frameworks, standards, policies, and best practices for data quality, metadata management, lineage, security, and compliance.
- Act as the expert consultant and technical mentor to the Data Engineering team, guiding them on complex implementation, optimization (e.g., Spark tuning), and troubleshooting of data pipelines.
- Collaborate with CTO/Leadership and business stakeholders to translate strategic business requirements into feasible, high-impact data architecture solutions.
- Evaluate and recommend new data technologies, tools, and platforms to ensure the data ecosystem remains cutting-edge and future-proof.
- Manage and maintain the overall data security model, including access control and data masking/anonymization techniques.
requirements:

- Expertise in advanced data modeling techniques (Dimensional, Data Vault) and their application in highly transactional and analytical environments.
- Strong hands-on proficiency in SQL and Python/Scala for prototyping and demonstrating architectural patterns.
- Deep experience with modern data processing technologies: Apache Spark (PySpark/Scala) is mandatory, and workflow orchestration (Airflow).

- Excellent ability to communicate complex architectural concepts to both technical teams (Engineers) and business stakeholders (Leadership).

- Experience with streaming architectures (Kafka, Kinesis) and real-time data processing patterns.
- Certifications in Cloud Data Architect (e.g., AWS Certified Data Analytics - Specialty, Azure Data Engineer Associate).
- Working knowledge of DataOps/MLOps principles and CI/CD for data deployments.

description:
Itviec’s client is seeking an AI-Powered Automation Engineer to rebuild how our 1,000-person manufacturing company runs using AI agents. In this role, you will skip the corporate fluff and focus on shifting code weekly to eliminate manual inefficiencies across departments. Working in a greenfield environment with near-zero politics, you will report directly to the General Director, define your own tech stack, and build AI-driven tools that deliver immediate, real-world impact.

1. NAS Cleanup: Use AI to read disorganized file trees, design a proper folder structure,
and mass-rename via scripts.
2. Data Integration: Stitch together disconnected Sales, Material, and Production data
islands into a trusted master file.
3. ERP Prep: Clean legacy datasets and write batch-loading migration scripts ahead of
next year's ERP launch.
4. Internal Tooling: Turn raw feature ideas from non-tech field staff into functional tools
within 48 hours.
5. Market Intelligence: Maintain AI pipelines that scrape competitor filings and websites to
identify potential buyers.
6. Task Automation: Eliminate daily manual bottlenecks across operations (e.g.,
automated cash consolidation scripts for Finance).
requirements: AI-Powered Builder: Must have shipped at least one real end-to-end project using AIcoding tools (Cursor, Claude Code, Windsurf, v0, etc.). Live links matter more than apolished resume.Hands-on Mindset: Comfortable diving into messy, undocumented Excel sheets. UsesAI to proactively learn garment operations instead of waiting for senior guidance.Communication & Languages: Able to translate factory-floor needs into technical tools.Must hold a working conversation in English or Korean. Nice-to-have: SQL, Python, manufacturing exposure, and ERP experience.
benefits:
Our client is a premier, large-scale OEM headwear manufacturer headquartered in Hanoi, operating with a robust workforce of 1,000 personnel. Far from a traditional garment company, they are driving a pioneering corporate transformation by aggressively investing in AI agents and rapid automation to fully restructure their enterprise operations. With a high-tech strategy and substantial budgeting that rivals modern tech startups, they offer an agile, greenfield environment where engineers communicate directly with top management, bypass corporate politics, and deploy real-world automation tools on a fast-paced weekly rhythm.

Salary: Meaningfully above the garment-industry baseline (strongly open to negotiation for top talent)100% salary during probation + 13th-month bonus.Insurance: 100% Gross Salary Social Insurance (BHXH) coverage.AI Tooling Budget: $200 provided for AI subscriptions and tools.

description:
Role Overview
We are seeking a Senior/Lead Platform Engineer (Databricks, MLops, AWS) who will take ownership of the design, implementation and operation of our core data, analytics and ML infrastructure. This role spans across platform architecture, DevSecOps, DataOps, and ML infrastructure, and requires a combination of strategic thought leadership and hands-on execution. You will build, integrate and operate platforms on AWS and Databricks, enabling scalable, secure, production-grade ML/AI solutions.
Key Responsibilities
Architect and implement end-to-end data and ML platforms: data lakes, warehouses, streaming and batch pipelines, model training/deployment infrastructure, on AWS + Databricks. Lead DevSecOps and DataOps practices: infrastructure as code (IaC), CI/CD pipelines for data & ML workflows, secure multi-account/multi-region cloud operations. Integrate AWS services (e.g., S3, Redshift, Kinesis, Lambda, EKS/ECS) with Databricks runtime, Delta Lake, Unity Catalog etc to build scalable, performant pipelines. Build and operate ML infrastructure: training clusters, model versioning, MLOps toolchain (e.g., MLflow), model monitoring and observability, automatic retraining workflows. Establish data governance, lineage, quality, observability standards across data pipelines and ML workflows. Mentor engineering teams, define architectural best practices and guide implementation of high-scale data/ML systems. Optimize system performance, cost and scalability; diagnose and resolve large-scale production issues. Continuously evaluate new tools and technologies in the areas of cloud, data platform, DevSecOps, ML infrastructure and apply them to drive innovation.
requirements: 7+ years of experience in data platform architecture, cloud/ML infrastructure engineering or related roles. Deep technical expertise in Databricks and AWS: demonstrated ability to design, integrate and operate solutions spanning both platforms. Strong hands-on implementation skills: you will not just design but build, deploy and operate the platform. Proven track record of building and operating scalable ML/AI platforms in production (model training & deployment). Expertise in Apache Spark, Delta Lake, modern data pipeline frameworks (batch + streaming). Strong background in infrastructure as code (Terraform, CloudFormation), CI/CD for data/ML, and DevSecOps practices. Proficiency in Python and SQL; familiarity with Scala or equivalent is a plus. Experience with data governance, data lineage, observability and MLOps frameworks (e.g., MLflow, Airflow, dbt). Bonus: Experience in fintech, regulated industries or high-security environments.
benefits:
You’ll love working with us if you are:
Passionate about technology.Independent but also a good team player.Comfortable with a high degree of ambiguity.Focused on usability and speed.Keen on presenting your ideas to your peers and management.
At TYME, opportunities are here for the taking. If you want to be part of our purpose and live and lead through our values, we can offer exciting development opportunities through expanded lateral roles, stretch assignments, or people leadership.
Some of our benefits:
Meal and parking allowances are covered by the company.Full benefits and salary rank during probation.Insurances such as Vietnamese labor law and premium health care for you and your family.SMART goals and clear career opportunities (technical seminar, conference, and career talk) - we focus on your development.Values-driven, international working environment, and agile culture.Overseas travel opportunities for training and work-related.Internal Hackathons and company events (team building, coffee run, etc.).Pro-Rate and performance bonus.15-day annual + 3-day sick leave per year from the company.Work-life balance 40-hr per week from Mon to Fri.Performance-based bonus and equity participation in GoTyme Group

job_title: Data Tech Lead (SQL, Python, Data Modeling, AWS)
description:
About the Role
The Tech Lead, Data Engineering is the technical head of the Data Stream and the architect behind our data foundation. You will lead a team responsible for ensuring that every AI-powered feature, personalization engine, and business insight operates on validated, high-performance data infrastructure.
Your scope spans the full data lifecycle — from event ingestion through transformation, storage, and delivery — up to the Feature Store and Vector DB level, providing a clean handoff to the Platform stream. You will translate complex AI and Automation requirements into production-grade systems, while ensuring BI and analytics teams have access to high-trust, well-modeled data products.
Key Responsibilities
Data Architecture & InfrastructureDesign and maintain our core data architecture, including OLAP storage structures in ClickHouse and vector search infrastructure in QdrantOwn the event data lifecycle from ingestion (RudderStack) through transformation, modeling, and delivery to downstream consumersImplement and optimize data modeling patterns (Star Schema, Data Vault 2.0) appropriate to each use caseDeploy and manage data platform components using Infrastructure-as-Code (Terraform or Pulumi) within AWS, with CI/CD best practicesServe as the primary technical lead for the embedding lifecycle — from generation through indexing, retrieval, and performance optimization in QdrantBuild and maintain the feature store infrastructure powering Glo’s personalization and recommendation systemsTranslate AI & Automation stream requirements into granular, technically feasible tasks for the engineering teamEnsure clean system boundaries: own everything up to the Feature Store / Vector DB level, with well-defined contracts for the Platform stream Data Quality & TrustLead the creation and maintenance of high-trust data products, implementing automated validation including freshness checks, row count drift detection, and anomaly triageArchitect and maintain validated data marts that serve as the single source of truth for BI and analyticsEstablish and enforce data quality standards, observability practices, and incident response protocols across the Data StreamTeam LeadershipLead, mentor, and grow a team of data engineers and analytics engineersDrive technical alignment across the Data, AI, and Platform streamsDecompose complex projects into well-scoped work with clear acceptance criteriaMake architectural decisions transparent through documentation, ADRs, and open communication
requirements:
Required Qualifications
Experience: 7+ years in data engineering or analytics engineering, with demonstrated ownership of productiongrade pipelines and data warehousesSQL: Expert-level analytical SQL — write, optimize, and debug complex queries without hesitationPython: Strong proficiency for pipeline development, automation, and toolingData Modeling: Hands-on experience with dimensional modeling (Star Schema) and/or Data Vault patterns in an OLAP contextCloud Infrastructure: Production experience with AWS data services; comfort with Infrastructure-as-Code (Terraform or Pulumi)Data Transformation: Experience with modern transformation tooling (dbt or equivalent) in a warehouse-centric architectureData Quality: Practical experience implementing data observability via Soda, Great Expectations, or custom-built solutionsLeadership: Track record of leading technical projects end-to-end and mentoring engineersLanguage: Professional proficiency in EnglishEducation: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics, or a related field — or equivalent experience
Preferred Qualifications
ClickHouse: Direct experience with ClickHouse or comparable column-oriented OLAP databases (Apache Druid, DuckDB at scale)Vector Databases: Familiarity with embedding workflows and vector search systems (Qdrant, Pinecone, Weaviate, or similar)Event Streaming / CDP: Experience with event-driven architectures or customer data platforms (RudderStack, Segment, or similar)Containerization: Working knowledge of Docker; experience with ECS or Kubernetes is a plusML / AI Infrastructure: Exposure to feature stores, embedding pipelines, or ML serving infrastructure
benefits: Full gross salary from Day 1 of Probation (2 months)Annual performance-based bonus (discretionary)Compulsory Social, Health & Unemployment Insurance from Day 1 of ProbationSupplemental health insurance — Allianz / Bảo ViệtMacBook provided for work12 days paid annual leave/year, +1 day per 5 consecutive yearsPublic holidays per Vietnamese lawTraining & professional development provided as neededFree parking
experience: icationsExperience: 7+ years in data engineering or analytics engineering, with demonstrated ownership of productiongrade pipelines and data warehouse

description:
Itviec’s client is seeking a highly skilled engineer focused on CAD data analysis and ML modeling to lead the design and development of our manufacturing data solutions. The engineer will work closely with cross-functional teams to build scalable, efficient, innovative backend and modeling systems that unlock the potential of manufacturing data. The ideal candidate will have a strong technical background in machine learning and 3D data analysis, coupled with the ability to create and execute a vision for processing and leveraging CAD data as valuable core assets within our cloud-based drawing platform.

Key Responsibilities:
CAD Data Analysis & Structural Research: Conduct core research and development to automate the generation of 2D drawings directly from raw CAD data. Deeply analyze and interpret complex CAD data structures to create, optimize, and evaluate methods for extracting critical manufacturing elements, such as holes, overall dimensions, and bends.Multimodal Embedding & Cross-Modality Search: Spearhead specialized R&D focusing on associating multi-modal engineering data assets. Design and implement algorithms capable of executing high-performance similarity searches between distinct data modalities, specifically linking 3D structural data with 2D engineering drawings.Automated Generative CAD Design Engineering: Drive forward-looking research and development aimed at achieving completely automated CAD data generation from text or system prompts. Train, refine, and deploy generative models capable of programmatically producing precise CAD command sequences.Native CAD Software Integration: Lead the software development efforts required to seamlessly integrate core cloud functionalities with major industry-standard CAD software suites, specifically SolidWorks and NX, enabling enterprise users to utilize the platform's advanced features directly inside their native CAD design environment.Technical Strategy & Organizational Impact: Participate actively as a vital member of a lean, expert engineering squad, contributing directly to long-term technical strategy formulation, structural data architecture decisions, and internal organizational management.
benefits:
ITVIEC's CLIENT is a rapidly scaling Tech Product Company driven by a pioneering B2B Tech Platform that optimizes global supply chains and data management for the manufacturing industry. Established in 2018 with global headquarters in East Asia, the company is currently in its 8th year of operation and successfully launched its robust Vietnam Tech Hub over 4 years ago (in 2022), operating modern offices in both Ho Chi Minh City and Hanoi.

Embracing a progressive, Western-style global culture rather than a traditional Asian corporate mindset, the company fosters an environment of highly open communication driven by a young leadership team. All engineers collaborate directly in English with global cross-border squads on a daily basis. A core highlight of their operational model is that engineering teams are dynamically restructured every 3 to 6 months based on functionality (Functional Teams). This approach continuously exposes talents to new international teammates, provides fresh architectural puzzles to solve, and ensures that career progression is 100% merit-based and completely unrestricted by corporate seniority.
Boasting an exceptional near-0% turnover rate over the past 4 years, the company offers market-leading perks, including 100% gross salary and full statutory insurance coverage right from day one of probation, dedicated commuting and childcare allowances, and an incredibly transparent path for long-term career growth."

description:
We are looking for a Data Architect to design and govern the enterprise data architecture that supports analytics, AI, and digital transformation across largescale port and logistics operations. This role focuses on data structure, integration, and governance, not day-today data engineering.

Design and maintain enterprise data architecture (data models, domains, integration patterns).Define data platform architecture (Data Lake, Data Warehouse, MDM, streaming).Ensure data architecture aligns with enterprise architecture and digital platforms.Review and guide data-related designs from projects and vendors.Work with Data Governance and business teams to define critical data elements.Support data readiness for analytics, AI, and automation initiatives.

Who should apply:
Data professionals ready to move from implementation to architecture.Architects who value structure, standards, and long-term scalability. Practitioners who want their data designs to power real-world decisions.

job_title: Chief AI Transformation Officer-CAITO, Data Warehousing
description:
CMC TS đang xây dựng và phát triển năng lực AI-X (AI Transformation) nhằm cung cấp dịch vụ chuyển đổi AI toàn diện cho các khách hàng doanh nghiệp tại Việt Nam và khu vực.
Chúng tôi tìm kiếm một Chief AI Transformation Officer (CAITO) có tầm nhìn chiến lược, kinh nghiệm thực tiễn sâu rộng về Data & AI, năng lực lãnh đạo đội ngũ quy mô lớn và khả năng làm việc trực tiếp với lãnh đạo cấp cao của khách hàng.
CAITO sẽ là người chịu trách nhiệm xây dựng, phát triển và vận hành toàn bộ mảng kinh doanh AI Transformation của CMC TS, bao gồm tư vấn chiến lược AI, nền tảng dữ liệu, nền tảng AI, phát triển các AI use case, đào tạo, chuyển giao và vận hành tối ưu hệ thống AI cho khách hàng.
Đây là vị trí lãnh đạo cấp cao trong BOM, đóng vai trò xây dựng năng lực cốt lõi và tạo động lực tăng trưởng chiến lược cho công ty trong giai đoạn phát triển tiếp theo.
KEY RESPONSIBILITIES
1. Xây dựng và dẫn dắt chiến lược AI Transformation
Xây dựng chiến lược phát triển AI Transformation của CMC TS.Xây dựng danh mục giải pháp và dịch vụ AI-X.Định nghĩa phương pháp luận (Methodology) triển khai AI Transformation cho khách hàng doanh nghiệp.Xây dựng các framework đánh giá mức độ sẵn sàng về AI (AI Readiness Assessment).Tư vấn chiến lược AI cho khách hàng cấp C-Level.
2. Phát triển danh mục dịch vụ AI-X
Chịu trách nhiệm xây dựng và hoàn thiện các nhóm dịch vụ:
AI Strategy & Consulting
AI StrategyAI RoadmapAI GovernanceResponsible AIAI Operating ModelAI Center of Excellence (AI CoE)
Data Platform & Governance
Data StrategyData GovernanceData Lake / LakehouseData WarehouseMaster Data ManagementData Quality Management
Enterprise AI Platform
GenAI PlatformAgentic AI PlatformRAG PlatformKnowledge Management PlatformMLOps / LLMOpsAI Monitoring & Governance
AI Applications & Use Cases  trong nhiều lĩnh vực khác nhau:
Enterprise GPTAI Knowledge AssistantAI Customer ServiceAI Sales AssistantAI Financial AssistantAI Risk & Fraud AnalyticsPredictive AnalyticsIndustry-specific AI Solutions
3. Thiết kế kiến trúc tổng thể sản phẩm
Xây dựng kiến trúc tham chiếu (Reference Architecture) cho các ngành: Banking and Financial Services; Manufacturing ; Retail; Healthcare;Government …Định hướng công nghệ và kiến trúc AI (Cloud, Hybrid, Private) ; Các giải pháp về Sovereign AI ; kiến trúc Multi-Agent Systems ; Kiến trúc tich hợp hệ thống ; Enterprise Knowledge Graph ; AI Security
4. Lãnh đạo Delivery và đảm bảo chất lượng triển khai
Thiết lập mô hình quản trị các dự án Data & AI.Xây dựng các tiêu chuẩn triển khai, vận hành và kiểm soát chất lượng.Tham gia định hướng các chương trình chuyển đổi AI chiến lược.Giám sát các dự án AI trọng điểm với vai trò Executive Sponsor hoặc Chief Architect.
5. Xây dựng và phát triển đội ngũ AI
Xây dựng AI Practice của CMC TS.Tuyển dụng, dẫn dắt, đào tạo và tổ chức đội ngũ: AI Consultants , Data Consultants , AI Architects , Data Architects , Data Engineers , AI Engineers , MLOps Engineers …Thiết lập hệ thống năng lực, lộ trình nghề nghiệp và chương trình phát triển chuyên gia AI.
6. Hỗ trợ kinh doanh và phát triển thị trường
Làm việc cùng Sales và Account Teams trong các cơ hội kinh doanh chiến lược.Tham gia xây dựng giải pháp, proposal và thuyết trình với cấp CEO, CIO, CDO, CTO.Đầu mối làm việc với các hãng, đối tác công nghệ toàn cầu trong lĩnh vực AITham gia các hội thảo, diễn đàn, sự kiện ngành trong và ngoài nước với vai trò diễn giả hoặc chuyên gia

benefits:
WHY JOIN CMC TS
Trực tiếp dẫn dắt chiến lược AI Transformation của một công ty công nghệ hàng đầu Việt Nam.Là người định hình năng lực AI-X của CMC TS trong giai đoạn tăng trưởng mới.Có cơ hội xây dựng đội ngũ chuyên gia Data & AI quy mô lớn.Làm việc với các khách hàng lớn thuộc Banking, Telecom, Manufacturing, Retail, Logistics và Chính phủ.Tham gia xây dựng các giải pháp AI có tác động thực tiễn lớn đến hoạt động của doanh nghiệp và xã hội.
BENEFITS & COMPENSATION

description:
Role Summary
Vietpay is hiring an Enterprise Database Architect who owns the design, modeling, optimization, and governance of Vietpay's core data systems. This role is hands-on and architecture-led. You will build and evolve relational, document, and graph data models, ensure high performance for transaction-heavy fintech workloads, and define standards that help engineering teams ship reliable microservices with clean data contracts. You will also lead the modernisation of legacy data systems, own zero-downtime production migrations, and establish the data foundations that support compliance, analytics, and AI-enabled workflows. Strong experience in SQL, MongoDB, Neo4j, and observability using Grafana is required.
Key Responsibilities
1) Database Architecture and Data Modeling
Own end-to-end data architecture for Vietpay's core platforms: acquiring, settlement, reconciliation, lending, risk, and reporting.Design and document relational schemas, MongoDB document models, and Neo4j graph models aligned to business domains.Define modeling standards, naming conventions, schema versioning, and change management practices.Design data integrity patterns for fintech: double-entry ledgers, audit trails, idempotency keys, settlement-friendly structures, and chargeback-ready schemas.Partner with product and engineering to translate business workflows into clean entities, relationships, and scalable storage patterns.
2) Performance, Scalability, and Optimization
Lead performance tuning across query design, indexes, partitioning, caching, and storage strategy.Optimize for high-throughput workloads with strict correctness requirements: transaction posting, settlement, and reporting.Define scaling approaches such as read replicas, sharding strategies, and workload separation where appropriate.Review and improve slow queries and critical paths, establish performance baselines and regression checks.Guide teams on efficient data access patterns and cost-aware design to reduce infrastructure spend.
3) Microservices, Data Contracts, and API-Driven Data Systems
Architect database patterns that integrate cleanly with microservices and API layers, favouring service-owned data boundaries.Define and enforce data contracts between microservices teams: schema ownership, versioning agreements, and integration guidelines that reduce coupling and prevent silent failures.Define data consistency approaches (strong vs eventual), including event-driven propagation, outbox patterns, and retries.Design strategies for deduplication, concurrency control, and safe retries across distributed services.Support schema evolution across services without breaking production, including backward-compatible migrations and deprecation policies.
4) Observability and Operations (Grafana)
Establish database observability standards: metrics, alerts, SLOs, and dashboards covering latency, throughput, error rates, replication lag, capacity, and resource saturation.Build and maintain Grafana dashboards tailored to fintech workloads: transaction throughput, settlement lag, reconciliation drift, and lock contention.Partner with DevOps and SRE on backups, restore testing, failover, and disaster recovery runbooks.Support incident response and post-mortems, drive remediation to prevent repeat database-related issues.
5) Legacy Modernisation and Production Data Migration
Assess and document legacy data models, tracing undocumented schemas and data flows before making any changes.Migrate tightly coupled monolith databases to service-owned schemas without disrupting live production traffic.Apply expand-contract patterns, dual-write strategies, and feature flags to execute multi-phase migrations incrementally rather than via big-bang cutovers.Write migration scripts and data backfill jobs that are idempotent, auditable, and reversible, tested in staging against production-scale data volumes.Manage zero-downtime schema migrations on live fintech tables, including index builds, column additions, and constraint changes under real production load.Maintain backward compatibility across API and schema versions throughout migration windows.Actively manage technical debt in the data layer: track it, prioritise it against product work, and communicate trade-offs clearly to engineering and product stakeholders.Deliver modernisation projects with zero critical incidents and a documented rollback plan for every change.
6) Security and Governance
Implement security best practices: least privilege access, encryption at rest and in transit, audit logging, and secure secrets handling.Define governance for PII and sensitive financial data: retention policies, masking and tokenisation strategies, and periodic access reviews.Ensure all data architectures support compliance and auditability requirements for financial services, including reconciliation trails and regulatory reporting readiness.Maintain data lineage documentation so compliance and audit teams can trace the origin and transformation of any financial record.
7) AI and Analytics Readiness
Structure datasets, schemas, and metadata so that analytics and AI teams can discover patterns and build models without requiring custom data extracts.Apply AI tools practically in day-to-day database work: query plan analysis, automated anomaly detection on metrics, schema documentation generation, and pattern discovery on historical transaction data.Design data foundations that support ETL and ELT pipelines, with clean separation between transactional and analytical workloads.Stay current with AI-enabled database tooling and proactively propose where it can improve performance, governance, or observability.
8) Engineering Leadership and Standards
Define and enforce database engineering standards across all teams: modeling conventions, migration practices, observability requirements, and review checklists.Conduct data model and query reviews as part of the engineering delivery process.Mentor engineers on data design, performance reasoning, and production-safe change management.Produce and maintain architecture decision records, schema documentation, and operational runbooks that remain useful as the team scales.
requirements:
Job Requirements
Must be fluent in English (spoken and written).7+ years of experience in enterprise database engineering or architecture roles.Strong hands-on expertise in SQL, including data modeling, transactions, indexing, query optimisation, and schema design for financial workloads.Strong hands-on expertise in MongoDB, including document modeling, indexing, performance tuning, and familiarity with replication and sharding.Hands-on experience with Neo4j, including graph data modeling and Cypher query design, with ability to identify the right graph use cases.Proven experience with fintech-specific data patterns: double-entry ledger design, idempotency key storage, settlement reconciliation schemas, audit log structures, and chargeback-ready data models.Demonstrated experience delivering zero-downtime schema migrations on production databases under real load, using expand-contract or equivalent patterns.Proven experience modernising or refactoring legacy database systems, with a track record of successful delivery without production incidents.Proven experience supporting microservices platforms, including defining data contracts between services and managing schema evolution safely.Strong operational mindset: monitoring, backups, restore testing, high availability, and disaster recovery planning.Practical experience with observability and dashboards using Grafana and related metrics and alerting stacks.Experience in financial services, banking, insurance, or other regulated environments is required.
Preferred Qualifications
Experience with event-driven architectures and messaging systems such as Kafka, RabbitMQ, or equivalent, including outbox pattern implementation.Experience with analytics and warehousing patterns: ETL and ELT pipelines, dimensional modeling, or data lake concepts.Exposure to AI and ML data preparation workflows, or practical use of AI tools for query optimisation, schema review, and anomaly detection.Experience with data lineage and catalog tooling.Familiarity with NAPAS, Visa, or Mastercard payment workflows and their data implications.Experience with migration and versioning tools such as Flyway or Liquibase.
Tools and Working Methods
Databases: PostgreSQL or MySQL, MongoDB, Neo4j; strong SQL-first discipline for transactional data.Observability: Grafana dashboards, plus common metric and alerting stacks as used by DevOps and SRE teams.Data operations: migration and versioning tools (Flyway, Liquibase, or equivalent), backup and restore automation, performance profiling tools.Collaboration: Jira, Confluence or Notion, Git-based workflows, and clear written documentation including architecture decision records and schema change logs.

description:
We are seeking highly skilled Platform Engineers (at both Mid and Senior levels) to architect, build, and maintain our next-generation Data Platforms. We operate with a strict engineering philosophy: no vendor lock-in. We are building a truly agnostic platform designed to run seamlessly across any public cloud (AWS, GCP, Azure) and on-premise bare-metal environments.
We are looking for builders who deeply understand how systems work under the hood. You will champion open-source technologies, relying on rock-solid engineering fundamentals to ensure our data infrastructure is scalable. Most importantly, you must possess an inherent Security and High Availability (HA) mindset-designing for failure and enforcing zero-trust principles at every layer.
Key Responsibilities
Architect for Resilience (HA): Design, deploy, and manage multi-zone and multi-region infrastructure. You will treat failure as a given, ensuring self-healing mechanisms, redundancy at compute/storage/network layers, and robust Disaster Recovery (DR) strategies.Security by Design: Enforce strict security postures across the platform. Implement Zero Trust networking, robust identity and access management (IAM/RBAC), secrets management, and ensure data is heavily protected both at rest and in transit.Build Cloud-Agnostic Infrastructure: Provision compute, storage, and networking required to support massive-scale data processing without relying on proprietary, locked-in cloud features.Manage Enterprise Storage Solutions: Architect highly available file and object storage systems (e.g., MinIO, Ceph) that integrate seamlessly with our compute clusters.Master GitOps & Automation: Treat all infrastructure as code (IaC). Implement rigorous GitOps workflows for provisioning, configuration management, and application deployment.AI-Driven Productivity: Leverage modern AI LLMs and coding assistants (e.g., Claude, Gemini) to accelerate your workflow—from scripting automations and debugging complex system logs to writing IaC and documentation—while maintaining strict security and review standards over AI-generated outputs.
requirements:
We prioritize foundational engineering skills, a security-first approach, and the ability to design for scale over memorized knowledge of proprietary SaaS GUIs.4+ years of experience, with a proven track record of architecting distributed systems, mentoring junior engineers, and driving platform-wide architectural decisions.Core Engineering SkillsHigh Availability & Security Mindset:Deep understanding of distributed system failure modes and split-brain scenarios.Experience with strict security integrations, including network policies, and enterprise secrets management (e.g., Vault/ OpenBao).Advanced Kubernetes for Stateful Workloads: Expertise in managing stateful data systems on K8s (StatefulSets, CRDs, Operators). You must be comfortable bootstrapping clusters from scratch, understanding about CNI, CSI layers.Distributed Storage Systems:Experience deploying S3-compatible open-source object storage (e.g., MinIO, Ceph RGW) for data lakes.Deep understanding of distributed file systems and integrating them into Kubernetes for persistent, highly available volumes.Operating Systems & Networking: Deep expertise in Linux/Unix internals, system tuning, and foundational networking (TCP/IP, BGP, DNS, HTTP, CNI plugins like Cilium or Calico).IaC & GitOps: Advanced proficiency with Terraform/Tofu, Ansible, and GitOps controllers (ArgoCD or Flux).AI-Augmented Engineering: Proven ability to integrate AI tools into your daily engineering workflow to significantly boost productivity and automation.
Preferred Qualifications (The "Nice-to-Haves")
Hands-on experience with deploying and tuning open-source distributed large scale data systems.Programming proficiency in Go, Python for writing K8S operators or system-level automation.Experience running stateful workloads on bare-metal servers or private cloud hypervisors (e.g., Proxmox, OpenStack).True Engineering Freedom: You won't be limited by a managed SaaS provider. You have the freedom to look under the hood, tweak the source code, and build platforms the right way.Future-Proof Skills: By focusing on core fundamentals and open-source standards, your work will remain highly relevant regardless of market shifts.Impact: Your work will serve as the absolute, rock-solid foundation for our entire company's data and AI initiatives.

description:
Job Purpose
Backup System Operator is responsible for maintaining the stability, availability, and security of backup infrastructure and related IT services. The role supports backup operations, monitoring, incident handling, backup strategy implementation, and data recovery activities to ensure committed SLAs and business continuity.
Key Responsibilities
Operate, monitor, and maintain backup infrastructure and related IT services. Ensure backup system availability, stability, and recovery readiness in compliance with committed SLAs. Perform backup checks, troubleshooting, incident handling, and corrective actions. Deploy, maintain, upgrade, and optimize backup systems and related technologies. Implement backup strategies, data recovery processes, and security solutions. Manage backup configurations, system assets, operational procedures, and infrastructure standards. Monitor resource utilization, maintain capacity planning, and improve operational efficiency. Participate in change management, configuration management, and CAB activities. Coordinate with related teams and vendors to resolve incidents and improve service quality. Prepare operational checklists, reports, and technical documentation.
requirements:
Degree in Computing or Information Science, or Postgraduate Diploma in Computer or Information Science. Minimum 3 years of experience in backup infrastructure operations or related system administration roles.Strong knowledge of enterprise infrastructure including Servers, Storage Area Networks (SAN), Network Attached Storage (NAS), Tape Libraries, De-duplication, Encryption, Compression, and Synchronization technologies. Hands-on experience working with operating platforms including Windows, RedHat, AIX, and VMware. Understanding of DC–DR infrastructure standards and backup architecture. Experience operating and administering backup and archiving systems using leading vendor solutions. Experience troubleshooting and resolving issues on backup systems during operation. Experience working with enterprise backup products and backup solutions. Strong understanding of backup strategies, data recovery, and infrastructure management. Good communication and technical reporting skills. Ability to work effectively within highly technical teams. Awareness of current industry trends and applicable technologies.
Nice to Have
Experience with enterprise backup, archiving, and disaster recovery solutions. Experience designing or optimizing backup and recovery strategies. Relevant infrastructure or backup-related certifications.

description:
Purpose of the position
The Operational Excellence Specialist will ensure operational efficiency, standardization, and data-driven decision-making for the 4PL Control Tower. This role combines data analytics, reporting optimization, system enhancements, and process improvement to enhance business performance. The specialist will harmonize reporting, automate workflows, support system testing, and provide training while collaborating with IT, business stakeholders, and operational teams
Main Duties & Responsibilities
1. Reporting & Data Analytics
Manage Ocean operational (KPI Dashboard), financial, and management reporting, ensuring 100% data accuracy and standardization.Evaluate existing business analytics & data integrations, identify gaps and propose improvements.Develop and maintain KPIs, dashboards, and automated reports to support decision-making.Draft and review reporting change proposals for new or modified reports.Coordinate with the Regional Team to implement data solutions aligned with business needs.Lead User Acceptance Testing (UAT) and quality reviews for reporting enhancements.
2. Process Improvement & System Optimization
Drive harmonization, standardization, and automation of Ocean reporting and workflows.Analyze service failures, determine root causes, and implement corrective actions.Establish and execute an operational continuous improvement program.Document SOPs, workflows, and best practices for consistency.Facilitate adoption of new processes/systems through structured training programs.Test new/changed modules in core operational tools to ensure functionality and compliance.
3. Stakeholder Engagement & Support
Engage with business stakeholders to define reporting and process optimization requirements.Provide onsite/remote support to operational teams on system and process-related issues.Collaborate with IT and business teams to align system enhancements with operational needs
requirements:
Minimum 2+years of experience in data analysis, business process improvement, or a similar role.Strong data analytics & reporting skills (Power BI, SQL, Excel, TMS).Experience with Business Objects or Crystal Reporting (preferred).Proven track record in process improvement, workflow documentation, and project execution.Ability to translate data insights into actionable business recommendations.Skilled at cross-functional collaboration, with the ability to communicate complex insights clearly.Experience delivering presentations and training to diverse audiences.

Strong analytical and problem-solving capabilitiesAdvances proficiency in Macro Excel and Database toolsMeticulous attention to detail and accuracy

Proven experience in project management, delivering measurable results on timeAbility to manage multiple complex projects simultaneouslyQuality and efficiency-driven working style

Fluent in Business English (written and spoken)Excellent stakeholder management and communication skillsCooperative team player with strong interpersonal skills
4. Personal Attributes
Proactive, positive, and self-driven attitudeStrong organizational skills and ability to prioritizeEnthusiastic and adaptable in fast-paced environments

description:
Position Overview
We are seeking an experienced Industrial Data Systems Engineer to help design and build software and data infrastructure supporting advanced manufacturing and industrial process development initiatives.
In this role, you will develop systems that collect, organize, store, and process operational and machine-related data from industrial environments. Working alongside AI/ML engineers and manufacturing specialists, you will help create reliable data infrastructure and backend systems that support analytics, process optimization, and AI-driven applications.
This is a hands-on engineering role focused on practical implementation, system reliability, and scalable industrial software architecture.
Key Responsibilities
Design, build, and maintain backend systems supporting industrial and manufacturing data collectionDevelop data ingestion pipelines for machine, sensor, and operational dataBuild and manage databases for structured and unstructured manufacturing-related dataDevelop APIs and services supporting downstream analytics and AI/ML applicationsSupport integration with industrial equipment, controllers, sensors, and external systems where requiredAssist with deployment and maintenance of on-premise, edge, and cloud-connected infrastructure environmentsCollaborate with AI/ML engineers to support model training, inference, and operational deployment requirementsMonitor and improve system reliability, data consistency, and overall platform performanceDocument system architectures, workflows, and technical configurationsParticipate in experimentation, troubleshooting, and continuous improvement activities
